Package it.unipi.tonightscall.entity.document

package it.unipi.tonightscall.entity.document
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstracOrganizer
    Abstract Base Entity representing an Organizer in the MongoDB "Organizers" collection.
    Address
    Embedded Entity representing the User's hometown.
    Attendent
    Embedded Entity representing a user attending an event.
    Event
    Embedded Entity representing an event.
    EventOrganization
    Embedded entity representing a brief summary of an event managed by an organization.
    Location
    Embedded Entity representing a GeoJSON location point.
    Members
    Embedded entity representing a member of an organization.
    Organization
    Entity representing an Organization (Company/Group).
    OrganizationForLinking
    Embedded entity representing a lightweight link to an Organization.
    Organizer
    Entity representing an individual Organizer (Person).
    Request
    Embedded entity representing an organizer request to join an organization
    Review
    Embedded entity representing a review left by a user for an event.
    ReviewEvent
    Embedded Entity representing a summary of an event review.
    Statistics
    Embedded entity containing analytics and statistics for an event.
    User
    MongoDB Entity representing a User.
